description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking, angular body finished in a gradient blue burst, transitioning from a deep blue at the edges to a lighter blue at the center. The body features two metallic control knobs and a three-way switch, along with a chrome bridge and two humbucker pickups. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard adorned with rectangular inlays. The headstock is pointed and slightly offset, equipped with six inline tuning pegs and a white truss rod cover. The back of the guitar reveals the same blue burst finish and a bolt-on neck construction. The overall design is modern and aggressive, suitable for rock or metal genres, and the instrument is sized for comfortable play while standing or sitting.
description: A modern, angular electric guitar with a blue burst finish, chrome hardware, and a pointed headstock. It features two humbucker pickups, two control knobs, and a bolt-on maple neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue burst body, chrome bridge, two humbucker pickups, two control knobs, three-way switch, and the full fretboard with inlays.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the alignment of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue burst finish on the back, the bolt-on neck joint, and the absence of hardware or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body thickness and the side profile of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed, six-inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, white truss rod cover
